sentence: 这首歌的副歌部分特别容易上口。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu gē de fùgē bùfen tèbié róngyì shàngkǒu.
english: The chorus of this song is especially catchy.

sentence: 历史课讲到了俄国沙皇的统治时期。
pinyin: Lìshǐ kè jiǎng dào le Éguó shāhuáng de tǒngzhì shíqī.
english: The history class covered the period of Czarist rule in Russia.

meaning: 1. collection of pictures; 2. atlas; 3. CL:本[běn],部[bù]
sentence: 图书馆里有一本精美的世界地理图集。
pinyin: Túshūguǎn lǐ yǒu yī běn jīngměi de shìjiè dìlǐ tújí.
english: There is a beautiful world geography atlas in the library.

meaning: 1. to establish; 2. to found; 3. to create (a good environment)
sentence: 学校创设了一个专门的阅读角。
pinyin: Xuéxiào chuàngshè le yī gè zhuānmén de yuèdú jiǎo.
english: The school established a dedicated reading corner.

sentence: 我昨天去银行开户，很顺利。
pinyin: Wǒ zuótiān qù yínháng kāihù, hěn shùnlì.
english: I went to the bank yesterday to open an account and it went smoothly.
